news.title: Now a Truman Scholar, UW junior Miranda Garcia-Dove’s dedication to public service is driven by curiosity and kindness
news.summary_en: One of the top academic awards for undergraduate students, Truman Scholarships support the next generation of leaders

news.title: ‘Being part of something bigger than you’ with Badger Volunteers
news.summary_en: UW–Madison students head into the local community to find purpose and make a difference.

news.title: Five UW–Madison professors elected to American Academy of Arts & Sciences
news.summary_en: The new members, representing a wide range of academic research areas, were selected for accomplishments in their fields.

news.title: The Crazylegs Classic kicks off spring in Madison
news.summary_en: Evolving into a major event, the annual run/walk celebrates campus scenery and Badger community.

news.title: Three UW–Madison professors earn Guggenheim Fellowships
news.summary_en: The prestigious awards recognize their prior career achievements and future promise.

news.title: Faculty Senate sets start of fall 2027 semester for Sept. 2
news.summary_en: The amendment changes dates for finals and the grading deadline but does not change the dates for Thanksgiving recess or Winter 2027 Commencement.

news.title: UW–Madison leadership seeks employee feedback on administrative services
news.summary_en: The 2026 Administrative Quality Satisfaction Survey invites employees to share confidential feedback on administrative services to help improve campus operations and employee experiences.

news.title: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Research announces changes to better support UW–Madison’s research enterprise
news.summary_en: Following extensive consultation, OVCR is looking to better align research priorities across campus, support university research and creative expression and offer improved services.
